Hero.title: Benoît Havet
Hero.subtitle: Fullstack Engineer — AI-augmented builder
Hero.tagline: React / Next.js / Mobile — short or long-term contracts

About.title: About me
About.description: Fullstack engineer with several years of experience building web and mobile products, I now develop AI-powered applications as a co-founder — orchestrating LLM agents, Claude API, and MCP integrations to ship fast and well. I bridge technical depth with product vision: I know what to build, how to build it, and increasingly, how to delegate it to AI.

Skills.title: AI Engineering
Skills.description1: Integration of large language models (LLMs) into production applications using Claude API, OpenAI, and agent frameworks.
Skills.description2: Design and orchestration of AI agents with tool use, MCP integrations, and RAG pipelines for real-world product use cases.
Skills.description3: AI-augmented development workflows: using Claude Code and AI tools to ship faster, with a focus on architecture and product outcomes over raw implementation.

Skills.title: Back-end & API
Skills.description1: Design and development of robust and scalable APIs using Node.js, NestJS, and TypeScript.
Skills.description2: Implementation of structured back-end architectures (controllers, services, modules) and business logic management using Prisma ORM and SQL databases.
Skills.description3: Integration of modern backend services such as Supabase, access security, performance optimization, and server-side best practices.

Skills.title: Front-end & SPA
Skills.description1: Building modern, high-performance interfaces with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
Skills.description2: Crafting smooth and dynamic Single Page Applications with attention to detail. Designing and developing reusable, scalable UI components with clean and maintainable code.
Skills.description3: Implementing testing, analytics, and performance best practices for scalable products.

Skills.title: Design & Experience
Skills.description1: A strong sense of design and UX to create intuitive and elegant user interfaces.
Skills.description2: Turning ideas and mockups into engaging, functional digital experiences.
Skills.description3: Bringing interfaces to life through animations, micro-interactions, and thoughtful motion.

Skills.title: Architecture & CMS
Skills.description1: Designing flexible architectures powered by modern headless CMS (Storyblok, Contentful…).
Skills.description2: Seamless integration between front-end and back-end using APIs and Node.js.
Skills.description3: Ensuring maintainability, scalability, and smooth deployment for long-term performance.

Contacts.title: A project? A critical bug? I respond in under 24h.

Cards.description: Responsive showcase website with headless CMS integration. Delivered in 10 days.
